meta.title: Cells – Back to Meaning Maximization
meta.description: Discover BtMM cells around the world. Local communities, one shared system.

zellenliste.neue_zelle_text: Want to found a BtMM cell in your area?

info.text1: Each cell is a local community of BtMM members who work together, share resources, and exchange services. Decentrally organized — but connected through shared values and systems.
info.text2: Cells can have different focuses — somatic work, crafts, consulting, education. What matters: people working together for a more just economy.
